ui_exit_confirm: Are you sure you want to exit?
map_WildOrchard_desc: A natural arena surrounded by dense jungle.
map_ChoppingBlock_desc: Watch your step! This kitchen counter is a warzone.
map_CrisperDrawer_desc: Sub-zero temperatures make for slippery battles!
enemy_potato_desc:
This tough competitor is
probably a cousin of french fries,
but definitely less
crispy. Uses its thick skin
to shield the weaker ones.

Usually silent, unless
it falls into boiling water.
enemy_garlic_desc:
Its smell knocks you off your feet,
and the explosion does it literally.
A true vampire nightmare.

Emotionally unstable, loves
loud and explosive goodbyes.
Warning: do not add to spaghetti!
enemy_carrot_desc:
They said eating carrots
improves your eyesight... and they were right.
This guy can hit you in the eye
from the other side of the garden.

Always keeps his cool.
His juice is dangerous.
enemy_broccoli_desc:
Childhood trauma returns
in the form of a mutated
little tree.

Has been training parkour since sprouting.
Before you can say
'healthy diet', he's already landing
with a bang on your head.
enemy_corn_desc:
Just a regular farm boy, but he's got
a full magazine. Stands perfectly still
and spits out popcorn at the speed
of a machine gun.

Rumor has it he works as a snack at the cinema.
